title: Email (Generic)
subtitle: Send and read email via SMTP/IMAP with any email provider
comments: Built-in email protocol handler. Auto-detects provider (Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, etc.) from email address via DNS/MX lookup. Falls back to manual server configuration for unknown providers.
authNotes: Email address and password (or app password) are configured through the email setup. For Gmail, use an App Password (https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords). For Outlook/Hotmail, enable IMAP in settings.

fields.label: Password / App Password
fields.placeholder: Your email password or app-specific password

setup.tutorial:
1. Enter your email address and password
2. For Gmail: Go to myaccount.google.com/apppasswords and generate an App Password
3. For Outlook: Enable IMAP in Settings > Mail > Sync email
4. For Yahoo: Generate an App Password in Account Security settings
5. Skyline auto-detects your email provider and fills in server settings
6. For custom/corporate email, you may need to enter server details manually
